scenarios.title: Information Retrieval Benchmarking
scenarios.when_to_read: Tasks that mention BEIR, benchmark IR datasets, retrieval evaluation, reranking, query generation, or BEIR-format corpora/qrels.
scenarios.role: Provides self-contained routing and workflow guidance for the BEIR Python package and examples.
scenarios.read_when: BEIR, beir, EvaluateRetrieval, GenericDataLoader, qrels, corpus.jsonl, queries.jsonl, DenseRetrievalExactSearch, BM25Search, Rerank, QueryGenerator, TrainRetriever, pytrec_eval.
scenarios.best_for: Preparing BEIR datasets, validating custom corpora/qrels, running retrieval metrics, selecting dense/sparse/BM25/API backends, reranking candidates, generating synthetic queries, and planning SentenceTransformers training.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is about a different IR framework, general Elasticsearch operations without BEIR, or production search serving unrelated to BEIR benchmark data formats.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `beir` when the user names BEIR or uses BEIR-specific data, APIs, metrics, or example workflows; use sub-skill routes to narrow from dataset preparation to retrieval, reranking, generation, or training.
